events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence check: Flanged joints industrial site. Observed field condition: wrong gasket type/material for service. Work in-progress. Need decide decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Wrong gasket for service is high risk, could leak, catastrophic. Need component_conditions installed-defective? Also non-compliant. Need percent_complete maybe 60? value irrelevant 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order maybe sequence steps for flanged joint assembly. Need state what must happen before work can continue: stop work, remove wrong gasket, verify correct gasket per spec/drawing/service, inspect, reinstall with correct gasket, torque per PCC-1, inspect/test. Need references ASME PCC-1, ASME B16.5. Need produce valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside JSON. Need include all fields. work_stage in-progress. decision fail. risk high or critical? Wrong gasket material for service in heavy industrial could be critical if incompatible (e.g., temperature, pressure, chemical). Use critical maybe. But maybe high. The instruction: if dangerous or non-compliant decision fail. Risk: critical seems appropriate for wrong gasket type/material for service in heavy industrial. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 70. value 0. sound_source ""? The schema says sound source when asked; can be empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order [] (not audio). workable [] maybe no new work can start until corrected. findings: wrong gasket type/material installed does not match service specification/drawing. actions: immediate stop work, isolate/depressurize if needed, remove incorrect gasket, select correct gasket per spec and material compatibility, inspect flange faces, reinstall with correct gasket, follow bolting procedure per ASME PCC-1, torque to spec, QC hold/inspect, pressure test before return to service. rationale: wrong gasket is a code/spec violation and service-safety hazard; must correct before continuing. references: ASME PCC-1, ASME B16.5, project specs/drawings. Need JSON only.

  "findings": [
    "Wrong gasket type/material installed for the service conditions",
    "Gasket does not match engineered drawings, specifications, or material compatibility requirements",
    "Joint is non-compliant and poses leak/rupture risk if continued or placed in service"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately on the affected flanged joint",
    "Isolate, depressurize, and make the joint safe before disassembly",
    "Remove the incorrect gasket",
    "Verify correct gasket type, material, rating, and size against drawings, specifications, and service conditions",
    "Inspect flange faces for damage, cleanliness, and finish",
    "Install the correct gasket and align flanges per ASME PCC-1",
    "Follow the specified bolting/torquing sequence and final torque values",
    "Hold for QC/inspection and required pressure testing before acceptance"
  ],
  "rationale": "A wrong gasket type/material for service is a specification and safety violation that makes the joint defective and non-compliant. Continuing would risk leakage, blowout, or process release in a heavy-industrial setting, so the defect must be corrected and re-inspected before work proceeds.",
  "references": [
    "ASME PCC-1",
    "ASME B16.5",
    "Project piping specifications and engineered drawings"
  ]
}
